summary: Full API and Frontend testing complete for CarryOn™ Estate Planning app after code quality refactoring. All 40 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: login, signup, OTP flow, admin dashboard, activity log, settings, checklist pages all working correctly.

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key: /admin' - non-user-facing, but should be fixed to prevent potential UI bugs

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health - Returns healthy with database connected (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/register - Creates user, sends OTP (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login - Sends OTP via email (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/dev-login - Bypasses OTP, returns token (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/estate/{id}/readiness - Returns readiness score breakdown (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/push/vapid-public-key - Returns 503 (expected - VAPID not configured)
BACKEND: POST /api/chat/guardian - Returns AI response with auth (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/stats - Returns platform stats with admin auth (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/activity - Returns activity log with admin auth (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/users - Returns user list with admin auth (200)
BACKEND: DELETE /api/estates/{id} - Deletes estate and associated data (200)
FRONTEND: Login page loads with email, password, verification method toggle
FRONTEND: Signup page has all fields: first/middle/last name, suffix, gender, email, password
FRONTEND: Signup page has SMS consent checkbox with legal text
FRONTEND: Signup page has Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links
FRONTEND: OTP verification modal appears after login with hint and 6-digit input
FRONTEND: Dev-login bypasses OTP and stores token correctly (carryon_token key)
FRONTEND: Admin dashboard shows stats: Total Users, Estates, Documents, Pending Certs
FRONTEND: Admin dashboard has tabs: All Users, Transition Verification, DTS Management, Customer Support, Subscriptions, Activity Log, Dev Switcher
FRONTEND: Admin Activity Log shows recent platform activity (49 items)
FRONTEND: Settings page shows Profile, Push Notifications, Subscription Plans
FRONTEND: Settings page has Weekly Digest toggle (data-testid='settings-weekly-digest-toggle')
FRONTEND: Settings page has Notification Settings section (data-testid='notification-settings')
FRONTEND: Checklist page shows 'AI Suggest from Vault' button
FRONTEND: Sidebar navigation works: Dashboard, Secure Document Vault, Milestone Messages, Immediate Action Checklist, Beneficiaries, Designated Trustee Services, Estate Guardian, Digital Wallet Vault
action_items: Fix React key warning in AdminPage.js - 'Encountered two children with the same key: /admin' (low priority, console warning only)
critical_code_review_comments: All E402 import order fixes verified working - no import-related runtime errors
MongoDB _id exclusion pattern consistently used with {'_id': 0} in all queries
Auth flow properly separates OTP-based login from dev-login for testing
LocalStorage uses 'carryon_token' key consistently in AuthContext

test_credentials.note: Use POST /api/auth/dev-login to bypass OTP verification

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup test users/estates automatically using TEST_ prefix pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 40 backend API tests pass. Frontend tested via Playwright with dev-login bypass. Admin dashboard, settings, checklist pages verified working. React key warning exists in AdminPage but doesn't affect functionality. VAPID push notifications return 503 as expected (not configured in test environment). Weekly digest scheduler runs as background task. Use 'carryon_token' as localStorage key for auth token.

push_vapid_key.note: Returns 503 because VAPID private key not configured in test env

webpack_compilation.warnings: useEffect dependency warnings (FamilyPlanSettings, SecuritySettings, AcceptInvitationPage, NotificationSettings)
